feed.title: My Portfolio
feed.subtitle: Showcasing my Jupyter notebooks and blogs

entry.title: Sample Post
entry.content:
title: “Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots” date: 2025-08-16 categories: [blog] —

This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook.

Inline math example: $E=mc^2$

Block math example:

\[\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}\]

Here’s a sample plot:
entry.summary: title: “Sample Blog Post with LaTeX and Plots” date: 2025-08-16 categories: [blog] — This is a sample post converted from a Jupyter notebook. Inline math example: $E=mc^2$ Block math example: \[\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}\] Here’s a sample plot:
